{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322054722C118971621C14B152E45"}"},"total":1277},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7488886870588818200","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我看有评论说后宫有点多，但是不知道大家有没有发现，虽然后宫多但是剧情方面都非常连贯也没有说一直都在写后宫，我感觉这种后宫写的还行，最起码不反感"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743646705,"group_id":"7178406483019697192","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111287763157"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7178406483019697192","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"498"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读22小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3814,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":80189,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7488884143461040920","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"你还别说，我之前一直都挺反感写海贼王方面的小说里面掺杂火影的，因为我没看过火影所以我都没看过这一类的小说，但是这本小说写的真不错啊，海贼王篇写的都挺好的，主角是一步步成长的，而且战力不崩，不是那种直接无敌的，而是那种一步步无敌的，看的话很有逐步成长的感觉，火影写的也可以，没有废话，剧情连贯，就是太少了，我刚刚看完，都忍不住看第二遍了，作者写的真挺好","text_exts":[{"e":18,"s":15,"text":"海贼王","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B5%B7%E8%B4%BC%E7%8E%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741296424B152E45%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227488884143461040920%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227178406483019697192%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B5%B7%E8%B4%BC%E7%8E%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743646586,"group_id":"7178406483019697192","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwxi4oxEjzCI9Cs6wQ67N3k=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"111287763157","user_name":"爱吃素炒小白菜的唐胜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111287763157","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7178406483019697192","book_info":{"abstract":"无系统+海军流+轮回眼+不吃瘪合理成长+各种强力恶魔果实
从蓝星穿越到了火影世界的宇智波千贺在开启轮回眼的瞬间又穿越到了海贼的世界。
在这里他发现自己的轮回眼可以吸收恶魔果实的力量，每吸收一颗就多一颗勾玉！
自然系毁天灭地的破坏力，超人系神奇多变的规则力以及动物系无与伦比的生命力，当他集齐了十二颗强力的恶魔果实之后，他成为了海贼世界唯一的六道仙人！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a4fab90bd9fee25f360262fb7f388a7b","author":"北山雨幕","author_id":"","book_id":"7178406483019697192","book_name":"大筒木之神，从海贼开始","book_short_name":"从轮回眼进化","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#401010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":368,"name":"火影","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=368&name=火影&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7178431306035167778","read_count":"12104","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1062075"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"516","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,火影,海贼,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2a6e3aa9190fe972640005dc73c60da5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779313642&x-signature=4E6Jim8YVFqcmNZVJsJMLY3m9Fs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2881169878692990","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"498"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322054722C118971621C14B152E45"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读22小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3814,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":80189,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5584},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7339538413775176472","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真实评价
1.文字错误：有部分章节的个别文字是错误的，但是不影响观看。
2.剧情发展：海贼王→火影忍者→龙珠，内容占比：海贼王＞火影忍者＞龙珠，其中火影忍者和龙珠的剧情发展快，就是走了一遍剧情，内容也没有海贼王世界里的精彩。
3.后宫程度：海贼王＝火影忍者=龙珠，只是瑟瑟情节简短。[吃瓜]
4.没有烂尾，是真的好，虽然结局草率，但是不影响观看。
5.三个世界的情节和内容联系性强，作者大大的能力是真的非常棒。
希望作者大大能再次创作一个更好的作品！
